title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses emerging autonomous coding features and practices, including the /goal feature and /Mission exploration for long-horizon tasks. The video explores tools and techniques that enable autonomous coder capabilities similar to or beyond Ralph-loop 2.0.
